pr-evidence/github-governance-open-prs/p.gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 reviewer Laplace approved after release-bundle validation was updated for open_pull_requests.
verification: poetry run python -m compileall -q src tests
what_changed: Added GitHub governance open pull-request summary and release readiness failures for unexpected open PRs.
Extended release-bundle validation to accept and validate the new open_pull_requests sidecar object.
pr-evidence/github-governance-open-prs/p.why: Release bundles should not quietly ship while stale pull requests remain open.
